ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}), p2 = (actor)-[:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {title: 'Raging Bull'}), p3 = (movie1)-[:REVIEWED]->(review:REVIEWED {summary: 'A darkly comedic take on Scorsese's own life'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s critical reception of *Taxi Driver*—as reflected in the review cited for that film—compare to the broader influence of his directorial work, particularly *Raging Bull*, on his public image and career trajectory?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})
MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m2:Movie {title: 'Raging Bull'})
MATCH (p)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m)
RETURN 
    p,        m,        r,        m2,        p,        m2
